definitions: To teach a person or animal a particular skill or type of behavior through practice and instruction.
To undertake a course of exercise and diet in preparation for a sporting event.
To point or aim something, such as a gun or camera, at a target.
To cause a plant to grow in a particular direction or shape.
examples: She trains every morning for the marathon.
The handler will train the dog to sit.
He trained his binoculars on the distant ship.
They train the ivy to grow up the wall.
